About Guidcy

We're building India's most trusted bridge between world-class expertise and the people who need it most.

Guidcy was founded in Hyderabad with a simple belief: expert knowledge should be accessible to everyone — not just those with elite networks or corporate budgets. Whether you're a first-generation entrepreneur, a student navigating career choices, or a professional seeking legal clarity, the right guide can transform your path.

We've built a marketplace where India's top consultants — former McKinsey advisors, IIT CTOs, certified therapists, chartered accountants, and more — offer their expertise in structured, affordable sessions with guaranteed quality.

Our mission

To democratise access to expert guidance by creating a transparent, technology-first consultation marketplace that works for both consultants and clients — with trust, fairness, and impact at its core.

Our values

  • Verified trust — Every consultant is background-checked and credential-verified before going live.
  • Transparent pricing — No hidden fees, no surprises. What you see is what you pay.
  • Outcome-driven — We measure success by real impact on our users' lives and businesses.
  • Accessible expertise — Sessions from ₹500 make quality guidance reachable for everyone.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about using Guidcy as a client or consultant.

For Clients

For Consultants

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: April 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Guidcy, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.

2. Platform Description

Guidcy is a consultation marketplace that connects clients with verified independent consultants. Guidcy facilitates the connection but is not a party to the consultation agreement.

3. User Accounts

You must provide accurate, complete information when creating your account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.

4. Bookings & Cancellations

Sessions must be cancelled at least instantly in advance for a full refund. Cancellations within instantly may be subject to a 50% cancellation fee.

5. Platform Fees

Guidcy charges a 15% platform commission on all completed sessions. This is deducted from the consultant's earnings, not charged to the client separately.

6. Prohibited Conduct

Users may not exchange personal contact information to bypass the platform, post false reviews, or use the platform for any illegal purpose.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2025

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly (name, email, phone), information from your use of the platform (booking history, session data, reviews), and technical data (device type, IP address, browser).

How We Use Your Information

  • To facilitate bookings and sessions between clients and consultants
  • To send transactional notifications (booking confirmations, reminders)
  • To improve our platform and personalise your experience
  • To prevent fraud and ensure platform safety

Data Security

We use 256-bit SSL encryption for all data in transit and AES-256 encryption for sensitive data at rest. Payment information is handled exclusively by our secure payment processor and is never stored on Guidcy servers.

Your Rights

Under India's DPDP Act 2023, you have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data. Contact privacy@guidcy.com to exercise these rights.

Refund Policy

Last updated: April 2025

Full Refunds

You are eligible for a full refund if: you cancel at least instantly before the scheduled session; the consultant cancels or does not show up; or a technical issue prevents the session from taking place.

Partial Refunds

A 50% refund may be issued for cancellations made between 12 and instantly before the session.

No Refunds

No refund will be issued for cancellations made less than 12 hours before the session, sessions that have already commenced, or sessions completed as scheduled.

Processing Time

Approved refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to the original payment method.

Disclaimer

Important information about the nature of consultations on Guidcy.

Consultations provided through Guidcy are for informational and advisory purposes only. They do not constitute professional legal, medical, financial, or psychological advice in a formal client-advisor relationship unless explicitly agreed upon separately.

Guidcy does not guarantee any specific outcomes from consultations. The expertise and credentials of consultants are self-reported and verified to the best of our ability, but Guidcy cannot guarantee their accuracy in all cases.

For medical emergencies, please contact emergency services immediately. For urgent legal matters, please consult a licensed attorney directly.

Frequently asked questions
How do I book a session with a consultant?▾
Browse consultants on the Explore or Browse page, open a profile, select your session type, choose an available date and time slot, then click "Book this session." You will be taken to the payment screen, and on completion your session is confirmed with a Google Meet link sent to your email.
What payment methods are accepted?▾
Guidcy accepts all major debit and credit cards, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), net banking from all major Indian banks, and digital wallets. All payments are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.
Where do I find my Google Meet link?▾
Your Meet link is shown on the booking confirmation page, in your confirmation email, and in your dashboard under "Upcoming sessions." The link becomes active 5 minutes before the session starts.
Can I reschedule or cancel a booking?▾
Yes. Bookings cancelled more than 24 hours before the session receive a full refund. Cancellations within 24 hours receive a 50% refund. To reschedule, use the "Reschedule" button in your dashboard — no fee applies if the new slot is more than 12 hours away.
Can I use the same email as both a User and a Consultant?▾
Yes. Select the appropriate login type (User or Consultant) before signing in. Each role opens its own separate dashboard with different features.
How do consultants update their availability?▾
Log in as Consultant, open the dashboard, and go to "My schedule." Toggle days on or off and select preferred hours. Changes are reflected on your public profile immediately.
How long does consultant verification take?▾
Guidcy's review team typically verifies consultant applications within 24–48 hours on business days. You will receive an email once your profile is approved and live on the platform.
How do I leave a review after my session?▾
After a session is marked complete, go to your dashboard and then Session history. Click "Leave review" next to the session, rate your experience, write your review, and publish. Reviews appear on the consultant's profile within minutes.

Have a booking or session dispute?
Dispute Resolution

Fair resolution,
every time

Raise and track concerns related to missed sessions, wrong service, cancellations, booking mismatches, or meeting-link failures. We review every case impartially.

⚖️ Impartial review
⏱ Resolution within 3 business days
🔒 Confidential process
💰 Refunds where applicable
How dispute resolution works
1
Submit your dispute
Fill in the form below with your booking details, what went wrong, and your preferred resolution. You will receive a unique Dispute ID immediately.
2
Guidcy reviews both sides
Our trust and safety team reviews your submission alongside any input from the consultant. We may reach out for additional information within 24 hours.
3
Resolution is issued
Outcomes may include a free rescheduled session, a partial or full refund, a formal warning to the consultant, or case closure with a clear explanation.
4
You are notified by email
The resolution is communicated to all parties by email. Most disputes are resolved within 3 business days.
When to raise a dispute
  • The consultant did not join the scheduled session
  • The Google Meet link did not work and the session could not take place
  • The service delivered was materially different from what was booked
  • A refund was due but was not processed within 7 business days
  • A session was cancelled without notice by the consultant
  • There is a clear booking mismatch in time, date, or expert
Note: Disputes are for confirmed booking or session issues only. For general questions or account help, use the instead.
Raise a dispute
Track your dispute

Enter your Dispute ID (e.g. DSP-482931) or the registered email address you used when submitting.

Escalation policy

If you are not satisfied with the resolution provided, you may escalate your case to our senior trust and safety officer by emailing escalate@guidcy.com with your Dispute ID. Escalated cases are reviewed within 5 business days.

Guidcy's decisions are final for disputes resolved in accordance with our Terms of Service. We are not a legal arbitrator.

Need general help instead?
